examples: That was small fry compared with the city's Circus Maximus, which accommodated around 250,000 people.
Gluteus maximus muscle wasobvious lower than deltoideus muscle.
Betrayed, Commodus kills his father and orders Maximus' execution.
Crowe went on to win the best actor Oscar for his role as Maximus.
The time trial course ended in front of the Colosseum, having taken the riders past the Vatican and the Circus Maximus.
